name: Executive Leadership
description: Fact-driven, authoritative style for VP and C-level audiences. Professional tone, low opinion, evidence-first. No fluff, no persuasion -- just clear analysis and actionable frameworks.

context.author_topic_knowledge: Deep familiarity with both content architecture and AI/LLM capabilities
context.audience_role: VP and C-level leaders in content delivery, UX, and digital strategy
context.audience_topic_knowledge: Strong conceptual understanding but not hands-on implementers. Familiar with content platforms and AI trends at a strategic level.
context.author_relationship_to_audience: Peer. Speaks as an equal presenting evidence, not as a consultant selling a conclusion.
